content:
# User-provided dark Liquid Glass screenshot - Overview

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: dark mode AI app, music/creative tool, premium dashboard hero, neon control panel
Evidence: screenshot_observed / high
Source: local-chat-reference:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-dark-neon

Visual traits:
- dark glass
- black translucent surface
- neon rim light
- rainbow caustics
- high gloss reflection
- deep shadow
- bright icon rings

Use when:
- dark mode AI app
- music/creative tool
- premium dashboard hero
- neon control panel

Avoid when:
- long reading surface
- plain enterprise CRUD
- medical/legal workflow
- high daylight mobile UI

AI summary: Use dark Liquid Glass for premium dark-mode components: black translucent glossy surfaces, neon rim light, white readable text, small rainbow caustics, and selected-state icon rings.

# User-provided dark Liquid Glass screenshot - Layout Rules

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: dark mode AI app, music/creative tool, premium dashboard hero, neon control panel
Evidence: screenshot_observed / high
Source: local-chat-reference:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-dark-neon

- Use dark glass for selected or premium states, not every surface on the page.
- Pair black translucent fills with strong white text and neon accent rings.
- Keep the outer rim bright enough to separate the component from the background.
- Use neon gradients in small rings, checks, toggles, or active tabs instead of full-screen saturation.

AI summary: Use dark Liquid Glass for premium dark-mode components: black translucent glossy surfaces, neon rim light, white readable text, small rainbow caustics, and selected-state icon rings.

# User-provided dark Liquid Glass screenshot - Accessibility Notes

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: dark mode AI app, music/creative tool, premium dashboard hero, neon control panel
Evidence: screenshot_observed / high
Source: local-chat-reference:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-dark-neon

- White text on black glass is usually safer than muted gray text.
- Neon accents should not be the only indicator of success or selection.
- Check contrast after blur because background colors can reduce readability.

AI summary: Use dark Liquid Glass for premium dark-mode components: black translucent glossy surfaces, neon rim light, white readable text, small rainbow caustics, and selected-state icon rings.

# User-provided dark Liquid Glass screenshot - Implementation Hints

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: dark mode AI app, music/creative tool, premium dashboard hero, neon control panel
Evidence: screenshot_observed / high
Source: local-chat-reference:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-dark-neon

- Use rgba(8, 10, 16, 0.72) with backdrop blur for dark glass surfaces.
- Add cyan/magenta/orange radial gradients as edge glints and small internal rings.
- Use larger shadow offsets and lower opacity to make dark glass feel heavy and polished.

AI summary: Use dark Liquid Glass for premium dark-mode components: black translucent glossy surfaces, neon rim light, white readable text, small rainbow caustics, and selected-state icon rings.
